query:
ALTER TABLE `properties` 
  ADD COLUMN `listingSource` ENUM('staff','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'staff',
  ADD COLUMN `listingStatus` ENUM('published','pending_review','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'published',
  ADD COLUMN `submitterPhone` VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN `submitterName` VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN `rejectionReason` TEXT;

ALTER TABLE `projects`
  ADD COLUMN `listingSource` ENUM('staff','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'staff',
  ADD COLUMN `listingStatus` ENUM('published','pending_review','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'published',
  ADD COLUMN `submitterPhone` VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN `submitterName` VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN `rejectionReason` TEXT;
